name: NamedPositionTable
summary: All named positions in a rhino document.

methods.name: Append(Guid, IEnumerable<RhinoObject>)
methods.signature: public bool Append(Guid id, IEnumerable<RhinoObject> objects)
methods.summary: Append objects to a Named Position.

params.name: id
params.doc: Guid of the Named Position which you want to append to.

params.name: objects
params.doc: Collection of Rhino Objects to be included in this Named Position.

returns.doc: True or False depending on whether the Append was successful.

methods.name: Append(Guid, IEnumerable<Guid>)
methods.signature: public bool Append(Guid id, IEnumerable<Guid> objectIds)
methods.summary: Append objects to a Named Position.

params.name: id
params.doc: Guid of the Named Position which you want to append to.

params.name: objectIds
params.doc: New object ids to be included in this Named Position.

returns.doc: True or False depending on whether the Append was successful.

methods.name: Append(String, IEnumerable<RhinoObject>)
methods.signature: public bool Append(string name, IEnumerable<RhinoObject> objects)
methods.summary: Append objects to a Named Position.

params.name: name
params.doc: Name of the Named Position which you want to append to.

params.name: objects
params.doc: Collection of Rhino Objects to be included in this Named Position.

returns.doc: True or False depending on whether the Append was successful.

methods.name: Append(String, IEnumerable<Guid>)
methods.signature: public bool Append(string name, IEnumerable<Guid> objectIds)
methods.summary: Append objects to a Named Position.

params.name: name
params.doc: Name of the Named Position which you want to append to.

params.name: objectIds
params.doc: New object Guids to be included in this Named Position.

returns.doc: True or False depending on whether the Append was successful.

methods.name: Delete(Guid)
methods.summary: Delete a Named Position.

params.name: id
params.doc: Guid of the Named Position which you want to delete.

returns.doc: True or False depending on whether the Delete was successful, Null in case the id does not exist as a Named Position.

methods.name: Delete(String)
methods.summary: Delete a Named Position.

params.name: name
params.doc: Name of the Named Position which you want to delete.

returns.doc: True or False depending on whether the Delete was successful, Null in case the id does not exist as a Named Position.

methods.name: Id
methods.summary: Guid of a Named Position.

params.name: name
params.doc: Name of the Named Position for which you want to retrieve the Guid.

returns.doc: The Guid of the Named Position. If not found, an empty Guid is returned.

methods.name: Name
methods.summary: Name of a Named Position.

params.name: id
params.doc: Guid of the Named Position for which you want to retrieve the name.

returns.doc: The name of the Named Position as a string.

methods.name: ObjectIds(Guid)
methods.summary: Array of Rhino Object Guids related to a Named Position.

params.name: id
params.doc: The Guid of the named position from which you want to retrieve the objects.

returns.doc: Array of Guid which pertain to the objects tracked by the Named Position.

methods.name: ObjectIds(String)
methods.summary: Array of Rhino Object Guids related to a Named Position.

params.name: name
params.doc: The name of the Named Position from which you want to retrieve the objects.

returns.doc: Array of Guid which pertain to the objects tracked by the Named Position, or null in case no such Named Position is found.

methods.name: Objects(Guid)
methods.summary: Array of Rhino Objects related to a Named Position.

params.name: id
params.doc: The Guid of the named position from which you want to retrieve the objects.

returns.doc: Array of Rhino Objects which are tracked by the Named Position.

methods.name: Objects(String)
methods.summary: Array of Rhino Objects related to a Named Position.

params.name: name
params.doc: The name of the Named Position from which you want to retrieve the objects.

returns.doc: Array of Rhino Objects which are tracked by the Named Position if successful, null if no such Named Position exists.

methods.name: ObjectXform(Guid, RhinoObject, Transform)
methods.signature: public bool ObjectXform(Guid id, RhinoObject obj, ref Transform xform)
methods.summary: Retrieve the Transform of a Rhino Object relate to a Named Position.

params.name: id
params.doc: The Guid of the Named Position

params.name: obj
params.doc: The Rhino Object from which to retrieve the Transform.

params.name: xform
params.doc: The Transform to retrieve.

returns.doc: Transform of the RhinoObject related to the Named Position.

methods.name: ObjectXform(Guid, Guid, Transform)
methods.signature: public bool ObjectXform(Guid id, Guid objId, ref Transform xform)
methods.summary: Retrieve the Transform of a Rhino Object relate to a Named Position.

params.name: id
params.doc: The Guid of the Named Position

params.name: objId
params.doc: The Guid of the Rhino Object from which to retrieve the Transform.

params.name: xform
params.doc: The Transform to retrieve.

returns.doc: Transform of the RhinoObject related to the Named Position.

methods.name: Rename(Guid, String)
methods.signature: public bool Rename(Guid id, string name)
methods.summary: Rename a Named Position.

params.name: id
params.doc: Guid of the Named Position which you want to rename.

params.name: name
params.doc: New name for the Named Position.

returns.doc: True or False depending on whether the Rename was successful. For example, this method might return False if you attempt to rename the Named Position with the currently assigned name.

methods.name: Rename(String, String)
methods.signature: public bool Rename(string oldName, string name)
methods.summary: Rename a Named Position.

params.name: oldName
params.doc: Current name of the Named Position which you want to rename.

params.name: name
params.doc: New name for the Named Position.

returns.doc: True or False depending on whether the Rename was successful. For example, this method might return False if you attempt to rename the Named Position with the currently assigned name.

methods.name: Restore(Guid)
methods.summary: Restore a Named Position.

params.name: id
params.doc: Guid of the Named Position to restore.

returns.doc: True or False based on whether the Named Position was able to be restored.

methods.name: Restore(String)
methods.summary: Restore a Named Position.

params.name: name
params.doc: Name of the Named Position to restore.

returns.doc: True or False based on whether the Named Position was able to be restored.

methods.name: Save(String, IEnumerable<RhinoObject>)
methods.signature: public Guid Save(string name, IEnumerable<RhinoObject> objects)
methods.summary: Save a new Named Position.

params.name: name
params.doc: Name for this Named Position.

params.name: objects
params.doc: Array of Rhino Objects which should be included in this Named Position.

returns.doc: Guid of the newly saved Named Position.

methods.name: Save(String, IEnumerable<Guid>)
methods.signature: public Guid Save(string name, IEnumerable<Guid> objectIds)
methods.summary: Save a new Named Position.

params.name: name
params.doc: Name for this Named Position.

params.name: objectIds
params.doc: Array of Rhino Object Ids which should be included in this Named Position.

returns.doc: Guid of the newly saved Named Position.

methods.name: Update(Guid)
methods.summary: Updates a Named Position, effectively storing the current positions of the objects which the Named Position is tracking.

params.name: id
params.doc: Guid of the Named Position which you want to update.

returns.doc: True or False depending on whether the Update was successful.

methods.name: Update(String)
methods.summary: Updates a Named Position, effectively storing the current positions of the objects which the Named Position is tracking.

params.name: name
params.doc: Name of the Named Position which you want to update.

returns.doc: True or False depending on whether the Update was successful.

properties.name: Count
properties.summary: Number of Named Positions in the table.
